title: stabilization gate for production-ready development OS baseline
goal: この開発OSを、実案件投入できる安定版として固定できるかを判定する。
scope: changed_files verification against latest scoped session
report and failure classification consistency verification
out_of_scope: performance optimization not required for stabilization decision
constraints: verification-only session must not introduce source code changes unless a documented blocking defect is found
if a blocking defect is found, do not fix it in this session; log it and stop
all stop reasons must be logged for future development reference
do not widen scope based on convenience or suggested optimization
objective: Verify whether the current main branch can be treated as a stable baseline for real-project usage of the development OS.
outputs: verification results for ruff pytest mypy compileall
report and failure classification consistency assessment
explicit pass or stop decision for stable baseline adoption
allowed_changes_detail: artifacts/session-115/report.json: create a verification report only
forbidden_changes: any source code fix in the name of stabilization

completion_criteria.condition: A stabilization decision report is created and records pass or stop with evidence.
Verification confirms that the latest scoped implementation did not exceed allowed changed_files.
ruff, pytest, mypy, and compileall results are recorded with pass or fail values.
A representative live-run result is recorded as either pass or expected fail-fast with a logged stop reason.
Preflight guard behavior is assessed for side effects without changing implementation.
If a blocking defect is found, this session stops with logs and does not expand into a repair session.

acceptance_criteria.description: latest scoped session changed_files are verified against allowed_changes and recorded
ruff pytest mypy compileall results are all recorded and any fail result causes stabilization stop
representative live-run result is recorded and classified as pass or expected fail-fast
preflight guard side effects are assessed and recorded without implementation change
report output and failure classification consistency are checked and recorded
if a blocking issue is found, the session outputs a stop decision with reusable logs instead of performing new fixes

review_points: 副作用なし（既存破壊なし）
